summary: Comprehensive testing of KiteAlgo Trading Bot new features completed. All backend APIs (20/20 tests) and frontend pages working correctly with proper integration.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
GET /api/journal - returns summary + filtered trade ledger data with all fields
GET /api/journal with filters - correctly filters by symbol
GET /api/journal/export?format=csv - returns CSV data with proper Content-Type
GET /api/journal/export?format=json - returns full JSON payload
GET /api/chart/candles - returns candles, indicators, zones, trendshift_signals
GET /api/chart/candles different symbol - works for INFY
GET /api/auth/zerodha/start - returns safe configured:false when credentials absent
GET /api/auth/zerodha/status - returns auth readiness without crashing
POST /api/backtest/walk_forward - runs successfully with walk-forward result
POST /api/backtest/run - returns backtest results with return percentage
GET /api/alerts/status - returns telegram_configured and webhook_configured status
POST /api/alerts/test - safely skips when alert credentials absent
POST /api/signals/generate (trendshift) - works and returns signals
POST /api/signals/generate (sma_crossover) - works correctly
POST /api/bot/start-multi - starts bot in paper mode successfully
POST /api/bot/stop - stops bot successfully
GET /api/bot/status - returns current bot status
GET /api/dashboard/summary - returns complete dashboard data
GET /api/strategies - returns strategy list including trendshift
Frontend /journal page - loads with filters, export buttons, trade table
Frontend /charts page - loads with controls, candlestick chart, TrendShift signals, zones
Frontend /settings Credentials tab - shows Zerodha auth status card and Connect button
Frontend /settings Alerts tab - shows channel status and Test Alert button
Navigation regression - all 9 sidebar routes work correctly
seed_data_creation: Demo trades created via bot start-multi endpoint during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints tested and working. Journal exports, chart candles with indicators, Zerodha auth flow (graceful handling), alerts (safe skip), walk-forward backtest, bot multi-symbol control all functioning. Paper broker simulation in use - real Zerodha/Telegram credentials not configured intentionally.

mocked_apis.paper_trading: Paper broker simulation for trade execution (by design)
mocked_apis.zerodha_auth: Real Zerodha credentials not configured - returns configured:false gracefully
mocked_apis.telegram_alerts: Real Telegram credentials not configured - alerts safely skipped

trade_journal.summary_metrics: total_trades, net_pnl, win_rate, strategy_breakdown, best/worst trade
trade_journal.filters: symbol, strategy, status, side with correct filtering
trade_journal.table: Trade ledger with proper columns and data

candlestick_charts.chart_controls: Symbol, timeframe, date range, indicators toggle, trendshift toggle
candlestick_charts.chart_rendering: SVG candlestick chart with EMA overlays, Supertrend line
candlestick_charts.trendshift_signals: Buy/Sell signals rendered on chart with signal tape

settings_credentials.zerodha_fields: API Key, Secret, Access Token, Redirect URL inputs
settings_credentials.auth_status: Shows configured status for each credential
settings_credentials.connect_button: Connect Zerodha button present and functional

settings_alerts.test_button: Test Alert button works (skips when unconfigured)
